Index.meta_title: QuizFlow - AI-Powered Quiz Platform for Modern Educators
Index.meta_description: Create quizzes in minutes, share with students, and get instant results. Free plan includes 10 quizzes. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited quizzes and AI question generation.

PricingPage.meta_title: QuizFlow Pricing - Start Free, Upgrade Anytime
PricingPage.meta_description: Free plan includes 10 quizzes. Upgrade to Pro ($9/month) for unlimited quizzes and AI question generation.

Hero.title: The smarter way to <important>create and share quizzes</important> for your students.
Hero.description: Build engaging quizzes in minutes, share with a single link, and get real-time results. Built for modern educators — create, grade, and analyze in one place.

Features.section_title: Everything a Teacher Needs to Run Great Quizzes
Features.section_description: QuizFlow gives you the tools to create, share, and analyze quizzes — without the complexity.
Features.feature1_description: Build quizzes with multiple-choice, true/false, fill-in-the-blank, and short-answer questions. Drag to reorder — done in minutes.
Features.feature2_description: Every quiz gets a shareable link. Post it to LINE or write it on the board — no app download required for students.
Features.feature3_description: Answers are graded automatically the moment a student submits. Scores and explanations appear instantly, no waiting.
Features.feature4_description: Upload a textbook, slide deck, or image and let AI draft the questions with explanations — saving hours of manual work (Pro only).
Features.feature5_description: See per-question correct rates and answer distributions across your class to quickly identify gaps in understanding.
Features.feature6_description: Export all student responses as a CSV file to import into your gradebook or school administration system.

Pricing.section_description: Start free and upgrade when you need more. No hidden fees.

PricingPlan.premium_plan_description: For teachers who want unlimited power

FAQ.question1: How many quizzes can I create on the free plan?
FAQ.answer1: The free plan allows you to create up to 10 quizzes. Each quiz can have unlimited questions and can be shared with any number of students. If you need more quizzes or want access to AI question generation, upgrade to the Pro plan for $9/month.
FAQ.question2: Do students need an account to take a quiz?
FAQ.answer2: No account needed. Students simply click the link you share and answer directly in their browser — no sign-up or login required. Once submitted, the score and answer explanations are shown instantly. You can view all responses in your dashboard.
FAQ.question3: What formats does AI question generation support?
FAQ.answer3: The Pro plan's AI generation supports plain text, PDF documents, images (JPG, PNG), video (MP4), and audio files (MP3). Just upload your teaching materials and the AI will generate multiple-choice, true/false, fill-in-the-blank, or short-answer questions with detailed explanations for each.
